headline: Starmer announces £53m support to help with heating oil costs
deck: The money will be for "vulnerable" households who have faced a sharp rise in energy bills since the outbreak of the US-Israeli war with Iran.
cnSummary: 英国首相斯塔默宣布提供5300万英镑补助，帮助易受伤害的家庭应对取暖油成本上升。自美以伊朗冲突爆发后，能源账单大幅增加，该补助旨在缓解这些家庭的经济压力。

headline: Alcohol-free beer and pet grooming used to measure inflation
deck: Houmous and motorhomes are also added to the basket of goods and services used to chart the rising cost of living.
cnSummary: 英国统计局更新了用于衡量通胀的商品篮子，增加了无酒精啤酒、宠物美容、鹰嘴豆泥和房车等商品。这反映了消费者支出习惯的变化，以更准确地追踪生活成本上升。

headline: PM says UK working with allies on plan to reopen Strait of Hormuz
deck: It comes after President Trump urged the UK and other countries to send warships to protect the vital shipping channel.
cnSummary: 英国首相表示，英国正与盟国合作制定计划重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。此举是在特朗普总统敦促英国和其他国家派遣军舰保护这一重要海运通道之后做出的。

headline: Firms urged to check if other users edited their data on Companies House
deck: The glitch meant logged-in users could view and edit other companies' details without their consent.
cnSummary: 英国公司注册处发现系统漏洞，登录用户可以查看和编辑其他公司的信息而无需获得授权。各企业被敦促检查自身数据是否被他人篡改。该漏洞已造成严重的数据安全风险。

headline: Is this product 'human-made'? The race to establish an AI-free logo
deck: The backlash to the growing use of the tech has led to an explosion in attempts to come up with 'AI-Free' logo that could be used globally.
cnSummary: 随着人工智能技术使用的增加，消费者对AI生成内容的反感日益增强，引发了一波创建"无AI"标志的热潮。这些全球通用的标志旨在标识产品和内容为人工制作，帮助消费者区分真人创作与AI生成的内容。

headline: She spent 16 hours on Instagram in a day. It's up to a jury to decide if Meta is to blame
deck: A landmark lawsuit will set the stage for thousands of people who say social media platforms are intentionally addictive.
cnSummary: 一名女性单日在Instagram上花费16小时。该案将成为标志性诉讼，涉及数千人控告Meta等社交媒体平台故意设计成瘾性功能。陪审团将裁定平台是否应承担责任。

headline: Iran hits key UAE oil port and Dubai airport
deck: The port of Fujairah plays a crucial role in helping keep global supplies moving when the Strait of Hormuz is blocked.
cnSummary: 伊朗袭击了阿联酋关键石油港口富查伊拉和迪拜机场。富查伊拉港在霍尔木兹海峡受阻时，对维持全球能源供应至关重要。这一事件可能对全球石油供应链产生重大影响。

headline: Iran taking steps to prevent anti-establishment protests, Tehran residents tell BBC
deck: Residents describe new security checkpoints around the capital, where they say people are stopped and searched.
cnSummary: 伊朗采取措施防止反政府抗议。德黑兰居民向BBC表示，首都周围新设了多个安检站，警方在此处对民众进行盘查和搜身，以加强安全管制并防止大规模示威活动。

headline: How US groups are driving a new generation of anti-abortion activism in the UK
deck: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?
cnSummary: 美国反堕胎组织正在推动英国新一代反堕胎运动。这些组织利用某事件激发跨大西洋活动，试图改变英国支持堕胎权的共识。报道探讨这场运动是否能成功改变英国的政策立场。

headline: U.S. is allowing Iranian oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz, says Bessent
deck: The White House believes tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will increase before Navy escorts are deployed, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said.
cnSummary: 美国财政部长贝森特表示，美国允许伊朗油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡。白宫预计在海军护航部队部署前，该海峡的油轮运输量将增加。

headline: Bessent says Treasury is not intervening in oil commodities markets and has no authority to do so
deck: Bessent addressed rumors that the Treasury Department or some other arm of government might step in to try to lower oil prices.
cnSummary: 美国财政部长贝森特澄清，财政部未干预石油商品市场，也无权这样做。他回应了关于政府可能介入压低油价的传言。

headline: Nebius jumps 14% after inking $27 billion infrastructure deal with Meta
deck: Meta is planning capital expenditure of up to $135 billion related to AI this year.
cnSummary: Nebius股价上涨14%。该公司与Meta签署270亿美元基础设施协议。Meta计划今年在AI相关资本支出投入最多1350亿美元。
